Industry First • Advanced Curriculum

Curated Mastery Paths

"Hands-on learning engineered specifically to forge the ultimate resume—proving systems mastery across AI/ML, Full Stack, and Distributed Data Architecture."

ESSENTIAL SYSTEM BASES

Systems and AI Essentials

In Year 1, Systems and AI Essentials runs parallel to programming, enabling students to learn core structures alongside AI from week one.

DSA & AI Fundamentals

Core Technologies & Libraries

Python BasicsReactJSData Structures Algorithms (DSA)File HandlingResponsive Web DesignArraysDictionarySearching & SortingAPI IntegrationUI/UX ArchitectureJavascript (ES6+)Maths for CS

In Classroom Concepts

Data Structures and Algorithms

Unlock the building blocks of core low-latency programming. Master linear and non-linear memory maps.

Web Development Stack

Learn to build modern, highly responsive, fully functional client-side portals from raw structures.

Core Maths for Computer Science

Explore the mathematics behind digital systems, abstract algebra, and how binary structures breathe.

Resume Flagship Projects

Systems / Git
FrontendFull StackIntern

Open Source for an Open World

Audit unwritten rules of major open source codebases and successfully merge your first pull request upstream.

Start Building
AI Integration / Full Stack
FrontendFull StackAI Intern

GenAI CRM Pipeline

Integrate LLM API workflows into customer databases with automated vector matching and dynamic dashboards.

Start Building
Core CS Challenge
Full StackAI/MLML Intern

Algorithm vs AI Optimization

Benchmark traditional deterministic structures directly against custom predictive regression layers.

Start Building
